message:
feat(api,nn): add F.interpolate modes, RNN sequence utilities, and reformat

Add multi-mode tensor interpolation (F.interpolate) to ft-api:
- nearest (1D/2D/3D), linear (1D), bilinear (2D), bicubic (2D), trilinear (3D)
- supports size, scale_factor, and align_corners parameters
- cubic_weight helper for Catmull-Rom spline (Keys 1981, a=-0.75)
- 11 interpolation tests covering upsample, identity, shape, batching, and error cases

Add torch.nn.utils.rnn sequence packing utilities to ft-nn:
- PackedSequence struct with data, batch_sizes, sorted/unsorted indices
- pack_padded_sequence with batch_first and enforce_sorted support
- pad_packed_sequence with padding_value and total_length
- pad_sequence for variable-length tensor lists
- 5 roundtrip and edge-case tests

Reformat existing code (rustfmt): collapse single-arg signatures,
inline short iterator chains, expand long if-else chains in
linalg_cond and special function tests for readability.

Update FEATURE_PARITY.md with interpolation and RNN utility entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -142,6 +142,12 @@ expit (sigmoid), logit, erfinv, gammaln (lgamma), digamma, polygamma, multigamma
 ### Parameter Initialization (torch.nn.init)
 constant_, zeros_, ones_, uniform_, normal_, trunc_normal_, eye_, xavier_uniform_, xavier_normal_, kaiming_uniform_, kaiming_normal_, orthogonal_, sparse_, dirac_, calculate_gain
 
+### Interpolation (F.interpolate)
+nearest, linear (1D), bilinear (2D), bicubic (2D), trilinear (3D) — supports size, scale_factor, align_corners
+
+### RNN Utilities (torch.nn.utils.rnn)
+PackedSequence, pack_padded_sequence, pad_packed_sequence, pad_sequence
+
 ## Current Green Scope
 
 - `crates/ft-conformance/fixtures/scalar_autograd_cases.json`
